error_signature: This method must be called with an app access_token
title: WhatsApp Trigger requires app access_token
symptom: When executing a WhatsApp trigger node, n8n throws an error stating that the method must be called with an app access_token.
applies_when: Webhook is registered in the meta app dashboard
not_this_if: Webhook is correctly configured with the right product
root_cause: The WhatsApp trigger node requires an app access_token that is linked to the correct product in the meta app dashboard. If the wrong product is selected during webhook registration, the app ID and secret will not function properly, leading to this error.
fix_steps: Go to the meta app dashboard
Select 'WhatsApp Business Account' from the product dropdown
Save the changes and retry the workflow execution
agent_instruction: Ensure the correct product is selected when registering the webhook in the meta app dashboard.
